description: CompositionGreen scooped neck top in 100% cotton, with gathers at the side hems, mildly puffed cap sleeves and chest print with sequinsFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub Tunic tops not only make you look slim but they also camouflage those unwanted curves highlighting the best aspects. While the soft chest print with discreet sequins makes the top a regular wear, the tank style enhances your well-toned arms, feminine neckline and shoulders, with the waistband and blousy silhouette ensuring you always carry a trim look. Team this with jeans or white trousers and ballerina flats for that ultimate feminine style. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
